title: PosCheckEnabled Property
description:
This property sets the end conditions of the force guide object related to positions.

Values

True Enable the end conditions related to position.

False Disable the end conditions related to position.

Default:  False

See Also: PosCheckEnabled Property

PosCheckType Property
see_also:
Applies To

FollowMove Object, PressProbe Object, Press Object, PressMove Object
